_comments: Sets JSONType metadata on UIConfig (MJ: AI Agent Channels entity) so CodeGen emits
a typed UIConfigObject accessor returning MJAIAgentChannelEntity_IChannelUIConfig.
The EntityField row must exist (created by a CodeGen pass over the new column) before
UIConfig field — channel-definition presentation/chrome config object

primaryKey.ID: @lookup:MJ: Entity Fields.EntityID=@lookup:MJ: Entities.Name=MJ: AI Agent Channels&Name=UIConfig
